title: Acronis Asset Rule
description: One rule declaration. Lives at ./rules/<name>.json. The executor is out of scope today; this file documents intent.

kind.description: What the rule does. `scale` resizes the base value's bounding box to the target. `stroke` sets every stroked path on the base to the target width. `color` replaces hardcoded colors in the SVG with a CSS value (e.g., currentColor).

oneOf.description: Numeric target used by scale and stroke rules.
String target used by color rules (e.g., currentColor).

target.description: Rule target. Required for scale/stroke kinds; shape depends on kind.
